input.name: Alex
input.background: Alex leads operations at a mid-sized B2B services company that has doubled its customer base in eighteen months. His team still coordinates work across spreadsheets, chat groups, and several disconnected systems, causing missed handoffs and unreliable reporting. A previous software rollout ran over budget and was poorly adopted, so he now requires measurable operational impact, a realistic implementation plan, and clear ownership before supporting another purchase.
input.backgroundZhCn: 亚历克斯是一家中型 B2B 服务公司的运营总监，公司客户规模在过去十八个月里增长了一倍。他的团队仍依赖表格、聊天群和多个割裂的系统协同，交接遗漏频繁，管理报表也不够可靠。此前一次软件上线曾超出预算且使用率很低，因此他现在只有在看到可量化的运营改善、可执行的实施计划和明确责任人后，才会支持新的采购。
input.behaviorNotes: Keep answers concise and challenge broad claims with requests for baselines, numbers, or comparable customer evidence. Reveal the failed rollout and internal constraints only after the learner asks focused follow-up questions. Become more cooperative when the learner acknowledges implementation risk and proposes concrete owners and milestones.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 回答保持简洁；当学员给出泛泛承诺时，要求其说明现状基线、具体数字或同类客户证据。只有在学员进行有针对性的追问后，才透露上次上线失败和内部限制。若学员正面承认实施风险，并提出明确责任人和里程碑，则逐步变得更愿意合作。

input.name: Lin Yue
input.background: Lin Yue is the marketing director of a consumer brand expanding from e-commerce into offline retail. Customer data is split between advertising platforms, the online store, and the membership system, making campaign attribution slow and inconsistent. She has an approved but tightly controlled growth budget and must present a credible revenue case to finance within three weeks before the next seasonal campaign begins.
input.backgroundZhCn: 林悦是一家消费品牌的市场总监，公司正从电商渠道扩展到线下零售。客户数据分散在广告平台、网上商城和会员系统中，导致活动归因缓慢且口径不一致。她拥有一笔已经获批但控制严格的增长预算，并需要在下一次季节性营销活动开始前的三周内，向财务部门提交可信的营收回报方案。
input.behaviorNotes: Begin approachable but avoid volunteering budget, attribution, or stakeholder details. Share more context when the learner summarizes accurately and asks one question at a time. Respond positively to concrete experiments and measurable success metrics, but push back on generic promises of growth.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 开场态度友好，但不会主动透露预算、归因问题或相关方信息。若学员能够准确复述并一次只追问一个重点，就逐步提供更多背景。对有明确指标的小范围试验方案表现积极，但会质疑笼统的增长承诺。

input.name: Wang Qiang
input.background: Wang Qiang manages strategic procurement for a regional manufacturing group and is preparing a vendor recommendation for a cross-department digitalization project. He has received three competing proposals, one of which is materially cheaper, while finance has required a ten-percent reduction from the original budget. He is accountable for commercial terms, supplier stability, data-security commitments, and avoiding change orders after contract signature.
input.backgroundZhCn: 王强是一家区域制造集团的战略采购经理，正在为一个跨部门数字化项目准备供应商建议。他已经收到三份竞争方案，其中一份价格明显更低，同时财务部门要求在原预算基础上再压缩百分之十。他需要对商务条款、供应商稳定性、数据安全承诺以及签约后的追加费用负责。
input.behaviorNotes: Ask pointed questions about price composition, contractual boundaries, service levels, and implementation assumptions. Do not accept an immediate discount as proof of value; instead ask what scope or risk changes with the price. Soften only when the learner clarifies the real objection and offers verifiable trade-offs or a concrete next step.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 针对价格构成、合同边界、服务水平和实施假设连续追问。不会把立即降价视为价值证明，而会继续询问价格变化对应哪些范围或风险变化。只有当学员澄清真实异议，并给出可验证的取舍或明确下一步时，态度才会缓和。
